message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'unix_stream_splice_read' sets signal field 'unix_stream_read_state.flags', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=unix_stream_read_state;field=flags;offset=40] [oracle:assert=unix_stream_read_state.flags stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets flags without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
